title: Spotify Clone
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Spotify Clone (DEM-2026-0013)

Executive Summary
This project proposes developing a Spotify-like music streaming platform to expand our digital entertainment portfolio. It aims to attract new users and establish a presence in the growing audio content market.

Direct Business Value/Impact
The platform will generate new revenue streams through subscriptions and advertising. It will also enhance brand recognition and customer engagement within the digital domain.

Potential Risk Mitigation
To mitigate high risks, we will adopt a phased development approach with strict security measures. Comprehensive legal counsel for content rights and agile feedback loops will be critical.
capacity_reasoning: High-risk demand requires Senior Architect oversight.
Delivery team has 26% overall available capacity.
Skill gap: Required skills Database are missing in the available workforce.
Earliest available start date is deferred by 30 days to 2026-08-08.
